label: OffGas Cloud API
info: HTTP API + command pipeline + dataset management for the OffGas dashboard

name: Dataset folder
info: Create the folder defined by DATASET_DIR and place these four files inside it: dataset_garage.csv, dataset_high_pollution.csv, dataset_low_pollution.csv, dataset_realistic_pollution.csv. Re-selecting a dataset reloads the file from disk.

ParseDatasetCsv
func: const text = String(msg.payload || "").split("\r").join("").trim(); const lines = text.split("\n").map(line => line.trim()).filter(Boolean); const rows = []; for (let i = 1; i < lines.length; i++) { const line = lines[i]; let parts = line.split(","); if (parts.length < 2) { parts = line.split(";") } if (parts.length < 2) { continue } const garage_id = String(parts[0]).trim(); const value = Number(String(parts[1]).trim()); if (!garage_id || garage_id === "G1" || !Number.isFinite(value)) { continue } rows.push({ garage_id, value }) } msg.payload = rows; return msg;

func: const text=String(msg.payload||"").split("\r").join("").trim();const lines=text.split("\n").map(line=>line.trim()).filter(Boolean);const rows=[];for(let i=1;i<lines.length;i++){const line=lines[i];let parts=line.split(",");if(parts.length<2){parts=line.split(";")}if(parts.length<2){continue}const garage_id=String(parts[0]).trim();const value=Number(String(parts[1]).trim());if(!garage_id||garage_id==="G1"||!Number.isFinite(value)){continue}rows.push({garage_id,value})}msg.payload=rows;return msg;
